    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ApiKpis
    DashboardKpis.build(String name, String domain, long success, long recovered, long notRecovered, long errors, long partial, long asyncFailed, Latency latency)
    Builds one failover point's KPIs (with derived rates) from its raw counts and latency.
    static ApiKpis
    DashboardKpis.overall(List<ApiKpis> perApi, Latency latency)
    Sums per-API KPIs into the global DashboardKpis.OVERALL aggregate, with the supplied overall latency.
